notes: AQA rules and source text were excluded from every external request.
Two broader re-review orchestrations were stopped after repeated long or invalid JSON completions; their usage remains journalled, but no partial review payload was promoted.
The seven historical 9231 rules were derived from official versioned syllabuses and rechecked deterministically by Codex; they remain codex-reviewed candidates rather than owner-approved data.

acceptedFindings.action: Mutually exclusive carried-forward AS results and the complementary application paper are marked optional; P2 remains mandatory.
acceptedFindings.evidence: The explicit valid combinations and Cambridge route table require exactly one carried-forward AS option plus P2 and the complementary Paper 3 or Paper 4.

acceptedFindings.action: P1, P2, P3 and P4 are mandatory; permitted applied-unit pairs remain explicit valid combinations.
acceptedFindings.evidence: Pearson Issue 3 qualification overview and unit-combination tables.

acceptedFindings.action: FP1 is mandatory; all remaining units are optional subject to the explicit combination list.
acceptedFindings.evidence: Pearson Issue 3 qualification overview and unit-combination tables.

acceptedFindings.action: Added deterministic best-official-grade selection across all valid two-option combinations when extra optional papers are supplied.
acceptedFindings.evidence: OCR H245 specification section on calculating qualification results.

rejectedFindings.finding: Pearson IAL rules have no combination constraints.
rejectedFindings.reason: The candidate stores the permitted combinations explicitly in validCombinations; a second prose constraint would duplicate the executable contract.

rejectedFindings.finding: OCR H245 does not state how many optional components are selected.
rejectedFindings.reason: All six valid combinations explicitly contain Y540, Y541 and exactly two of Y542-Y545. Extra-paper selection is now separately machine-readable.
The official linear 4MA1 Issue 2 specification targets grades 9-4; the allowable grade 3 cited by the model belongs to a different modular qualification.

rejectedFindings.finding: Cambridge A* should be inferred from an A2-only threshold.
rejectedFindings.reason: No supplied official evidence supports that inference for these routes; the engine uses the published overall route boundary only.

unresolvedEvidence: Historical source file hashes for the Cambridge 9231 2019, 2020-2022 and 2023-2025 PDFs could not be acquired because the official host repeatedly timed out outside the indexed document reader.
Board-specific resit, rounding and certification notes remain candidate-level where the supplied assessment overview does not state them explicitly.
Historical 9709 route/version policies still require a separate official-source reconstruction before 2019-2022 coverage can be considered accurate.
